ogTitle: Six Mile Swamp vs Skennars Head: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Six Mile Swamp and Skennars Head.
heading: Six Mile Swamp vs Skennars Head — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Six Mile Swamp, New South Wales and Skennars Head, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Six Mile Swamp has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Skennars Head (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Six Mile Swamp or Skennars Head safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Six Mile Swamp has a flood risk score of 33/100, while Skennars Head scores 27/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Six Mile Swamp scores 17/100 for bushfire risk. Skennars Head scores 63/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Six Mile Swamp or Skennars Head?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Six Mile Swamp has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.2% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
